name: Daiquiri
title: Daiquiri Cocktail | Daiquiri Recipe | How to make a Daiquiri | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A classic shaken Daiquiri made with white rum, fresh lime juice, and sugar for a crisp, refreshing drink.
marketing_description: Discover how to make the perfect Daiquiri cocktail at home. The original BACARDÍ Daiquiri recipe combines BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum with fresh lime juice and sugar for a crisp, refreshing drink.

steps: Add the fresh lime juice and sugar to your cocktail shaker, then stir until the sugar completely dissolves.
Pour in BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, then fill the shaker with half cubed ice and half crushed ice.
Shake vigorously until the shaker becomes frosted and ice-cold to the touch.
Strain through a fine strainer into a chilled cocktail glass for the perfect Daiquiri.

raw_text_excerpt: Daiquiri (shaken) Ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca 25 ml fresh lime juice 2 tsp caster sugar Cubed & crushed ice Coupette glass ... Step 1 Stir Add the fresh lime juice and sugar to your cocktail shaker, then stir until the sugar completely dissolves. Step 2 Pour Pour in BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, then fill the shaker with half cubed ice and half crushed ice. Step 3 Shake Shake vigorously until the shaker becomes frosted and ice-cold to the touch. Step 4 Serve Strain through a fine strainer into a chilled cocktail glass
